title: End Game Gear
description: End Game Gear expands the loot pool with unique items to improve Minecraft's progression and exploration.
body:
# ⭐ End Game Gear is fully rewritten and finally LIVE!

Check the gallery for all current content 📸 — item stats are listed below! 📊

A lot of this mod is balanced around my [Enchant Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ntys-enchantment-overhaul). You _can_ enjoy it without (and I’ve put a great deal of effort into making sure it feels good no matter how you play), but using them together is recommended for long term playthroughs.


## ⚔️ **End Game Gear expands vanilla progression to make every step feel meaningful** ⚔️

Inspired _heavily_ by Terraria’s progression and unique mob drops, End Game Gear adds new reasons to revisit old content, challenge tougher mobs, and chase powerful rewards.

Currently, the mod includes 11 unique items, with many more features planned, including:

🧪 **Crafting recipes for powerful items, including combination recipes**

🛡️ **Armor with unique benefits**

⛏️ **Tools, ranged weapons ✅, & [fishing rods](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-game-fishing) ✅**

🎲 **Rewarding loot table mechanics**

This mod encourages players to interact with mobs and mechanics that normally lack purpose in vanilla. Build grinders, hunt rare items, and chase god rolls to unlock new power spikes.


## 📿 Trinkets (🌟 New) 


<details>
<summary> Raven's Feather </summary>

![Raven's Feather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6c016d99b5bc9f0b071d398a44298edb7ff2675.png)

This Item will use the feather texture provided by the base game, or whatever resource pack you are using. It simply recolors it a darker shade of black / gray and should have support for every resource pack out of the box.

When held in off-hand :

- **Max Health** : -2 Hearts
- **Jump Height** : +1 Block
- **Movement Speed** : +20%
- **Safe Fall Distance** : +3 Blocks
- **Step Height** : +1 Block

When player dies while holding in either hand :

- **Instant Health II** : 4 Hearts
- **Invisibility** : 10 Seconds
- **Speed** : 10 Seconds
- **Weakness** : 15 Seconds

🎲 **1 / 200 drop chance from cat morning gifts**

</details>



## ⛏️ Tools (🌟 New) 

<details>
<summary> Spoon. </summary>

![Spoon.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff410608e353a20b0b94779a2452750a54765e6c.png)

⁉️ Big Spoon.

⚙️ Efficiency : 12

🗡️ Attack : 8

⚡ Speed : 1

✨ Enchantability : 20

🛠️ Durability : 4062

🎲 **1 / 150 chance to be dug up by sniffer**

</details>

<details>
<summary> Cobalt Pick</summary>

![Cobalt Pick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc4896d0b7ffddc41915a0c975a9634c993172e7.png)

⚙️ Efficiency : 12

🗡️ Attack : 8

⚡ Speed : 1.2

✨ Enchantability : 20

🛠️ Durability : 4062

🎲 **1 / 100 chance to be dug up from rare trail ruins gravel.**

or,

🎲 **1 / 150 chance to be dug up from common trail ruins gravel.**

</details>

<details>
<summary> Hellstone Maw </summary>

![Hellstone Maw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e712d2228fdd52b38a2846df8803c027cbbb2fee.png)

⚙️ Efficiency : 12

🗡️ Attack : 12

⚡ Speed : 1

✨ Enchantability : 20

🛠️ Durability : 4062

🎲 1 / 100 chance to be found in rare bastion treasure

• Spawns with Fire Aspect V

</details>

<details>
<summary> Corroded Cultivator </summary>

![Corroded Cultivator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9357307ca5a5810d369e82b15b3b6041fa81018d.png)

⚙️ Efficiency : 12

🗡️ Attack : 8

⚡ Speed : 4

✨ Enchantability : 20

🛠️ Durability : 4062

🎲 1 / 100 chance to be found in end cities

• Doubles as a weapon, and accepts axe and sword enchantments.

</details>




## ⚔️ Melee

<details>
<summary> Ancient Cleaver </summary>

![Ancient Cleaver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cfbdd7411551b7559fab5e2913dd46ed95aeaf5.png)

🗡️ Attack : 12

⚡ Speed : 1

✨ Enchantability : 10

🛠️ Durability : 500

💀 **1 / 10 drop chance from the Warden**

</details>

<details>
<summary> Murasama </summary>

![Murasama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0ba35ee9c458b6e1dc91678686f8d6fe22cfc75.png)

🗡️ Attack : 8

⚡ Speed : 1.6

✨ Enchantability : 8

🛠️ Durability : 512

🎁 **1 / 250 drop chance from Weaponsmith Villager Gifts** - [Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Hero_of_the_Village#Gifts)

• Heals the user half a heart upon defeating an enemy

• Weaponsmith gift loot tables have also reworked and now offer swords, as opposed to axes, as well as include diamond tiered gear.

</details>

<details>
<summary> Prismatic Blade </summary>

![Prismatic Wound](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dc35c444e3bf587985068423e2a3883cd2a19cd_0.webp)

🗡️ Attack : 10

⚡ Speed : 2

✨ Enchantability : 30

🛠️ Durability : 777

💀 **1 / 100 drop chance from the Wither**

</details>

<details>
<summary> Withered Claymore </summary>

![Withered Claymore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74c427b9bd52df589bca17f7f5993ea97aa826fa.png)

🗡️ Attack : 5

⚡ Speed : 1

✨ Enchantability : 1

🛠️ Durability : 256

💀 **1 / 1000 drop chance from Wither Skeletons**\* - See Below

🎲\* **Requires** the player to wield a weapon with Smite.                                                                              
Each level of Smite increases the drop chance by 0.1%
➡️ 1/1000 → 1/500 → 1/333 → 1/250 → 1/200. Up to 1/100 when using [Enchant Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ntys-enchantment-overhaul)

• Drops with random levels of both Smite _and_ Bane of Arthropods, up to level 10 for each. Making this a great weapon for adds... if you can manage a god roll...

</details>




## 🏹 Ranged

<details>
<summary> Radiant Oath </summary>

![Radiant Oath](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b0ac95184733ed9cc02e13855a6e1015ee47eb8.png)

✨ Enchantability : 10

🛠️ Durability : 777

💀 **1 / 10 drop chance from the Ender Dragon**

• Always drops with Mending I-V and Curse of Vanishing. 50% chance to roll infinity as well.

</details>

<details>
<summary> Sabrewing </summary>

![Sabrewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d304caf20b76ce97a336bfa6f658aba98c19842.png)

✨ enchantability : 2

🛠️ durability : 512

🎲 **1 / 100 drop chance from Desert Archaeological Sites**

• Desert temples & desert wells both have a chance at dropping this item when sifting through suspicious sand, but desert temples have a better chance at granting higher level enchantments.

• Has a chance to drop with higher than vanilla levels of Power (I - VII) in desert wells, (III - VII) in desert temples but has a 50% longer draw speed than the vanilla bow.

</details>




## 🛡️ Shields

<details>
<summary> Pitiful & Pristine Pavise </summary>

### Pitiful
![Pitiful Pavise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5474e9ced92c10a036aac2bac9e81624fc6aaeb8.png)

⚖️ **1 / 250 chance to drop from piglin bartering**

• Used to craft Pristine Pavise

### Pristine
![Pristine Pavise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a84e8b8cb48b73aff788d0c06a6185aa2a49c1f2.png)

🗡️ Attack : +2 **when in off-hand**

✨ Enchantability : 25

🛠️ Durability : 999

• Boosts the damage of weapons in your mainhand by +2.

• Higher durability threshold than vanilla shield.

Crafting :

![Pristine Pavise Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b987fb383b5d431397888f1da92865c59897dc7.png)

</details>




## ⚠️ NOTE

⚒️ Built-in support for [Dual Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/dual-swords) is now automatically handled through vanilla tags.

❌ Please do not steal or reupload my assets for other projects.

🐛 To report bugs or issues, message me on Discord: @ dmsw

📁 GitHub for issue tracking coming soon! (I'm lazy)
